calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Continued To Sep-12-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/12/2005 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Mtn For Stay Of Proceedings Pending Determination Of Litigation Pending In Dallas County, Tx
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven Bergenholtz, Plaintiff Propria Persona
Doug Perin, Esq. Representing Plaintiff in Texas litigation
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
PLAINTIFF STEVEN BERGENHOLTZ'S Motion For Stay Of Proceedings Pending Determination Of Litigation Pending In Dallas County, Texas is DENIED DUE TO INSUFFICIENT SERVICE AND FAILURE TO PROVIDE A PROOF OF SERVICE. MOVING PARTY FILED ITS MOTION ON 12/03/04, ONLY 4 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. PURSUANT TO CCP 1005(B), ALL MOVING PAPERS MUST BE FILED WITH THE COURT AT LEAST 21 DAYS BEFORE A HEARING. IN ADDITION, THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE SHOWING THAT MOVING PARTY SERVED ANY ONE ELSE WITH THIS MOTION. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina T. Paxton, CSR #1558

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2004 Text Ruling
